ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., ArtifactExistence) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the event */,
  "template" TEXT /* Template for the event annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the event annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent event type (for hierarchical event types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arguments" (
  "arg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each argument */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the argument belongs to */,
  "arg_name" TEXT /* Name of the argument */,
  "arg_type" TEXT /* Type of the argument (e.g., entity, instrument, location) */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Output value of the argument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the argument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the argument was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the argument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the argument (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arguments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arguments_arg_type FOREIGN KEY ("arg_type") REFERENCES argument_types ("arg_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "argument_types" (
  "arg_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each argument type */,
  "arg_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the argument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the argument type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the argument type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the argument type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arg_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the entity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the entity (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., software, hardware) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the instrument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the instrument (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., city, country, continent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the location */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the location (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event instance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the instance belongs to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text where the event was annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the event instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event instance was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the event instance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event instance (e.g., manual annotation, automated system) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_instances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_instances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
